description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CMake (WSL) that runs on push to main and on pull requests to main, ignoring certain paths. Use an ubuntu-latest job with a matrix strategy to build for x64-Debug-Linux and x64-Release-Linux with GCC 12, 13, and 14. The job checks out the repository, sets up Ninja, installs VCPKG, configures CMake with VCPKG, and builds the project.
